name: Recruitment Rules
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.78
description: Recruit task mechanics. Crew <6: automatic recruit per crew member sent. Crew >=6: Roll D6 + number of crew recruiting, 6+ = new recruit.

rules.auto_recruit_rule: If crew size is below 6, each crew member sent to Recruit automatically gains one new crew member (until crew reaches 6).
rules.roll_recruit_rule: If crew size is 6 or more, roll 1D6 + number of crew members recruiting. On a 6+, gain one new recruit.
rules.recruit_profile: Use random character creation method (p.14). New recruit has basic profile and a Handgun.
rules.notes: No recruit types, tiers, costs, or quality levels. All recruits are created using the standard character creation tables.
